Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.TaskDailyWorkflowSection

Represents the task sections for the improved daily workflow (a.k.a. TaskList 2.0).

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
SectionTitle

Title of the section

 string

None.
TaskDailyWorkflow

Tasks that fall into this section

 EntityListOfItslearning.RestApi.Entities.TaskDailyWorkflow

None.
BackToText

The text to come back to this section

 string

None.
StartOpen

 boolean

None.
